agents.name: Triage Orchestrator
agents.purpose: The crew lead. Runs RCA, hands locator failures to Heal, runs the Flaky detector, and posts one PR-ready summary. The single command you wire into CI.
agents.output: Combined markdown summary: counts per RCA category, healed vs escalated, flaky vs quarantined, Jira drafts.
agents.promptExcerpt: Run RCA on the report, hand locator failures to heal, then run the flaky detector. Print a one-line summary. Keep each sub-agent independent.
agents.howToUse: Run after every CI build. This is the orchestrator — the other three are its workers.

agents.name: Root Cause Analysis
agents.purpose: Classify every Playwright failure into product / test / env / locator, with confidence + suggested fix. Files Jira bugs for product defects.
agents.output: RcaVerdict[] — per-failure category + rootCause + confidence + evidence + severity + suggestedFix + routeTo
agents.promptExcerpt: You are a senior SDET. Classify failures into product|test|env|locator. Return STRICT JSON only.

sampleOutput.rootCause: Locator timeout · 'Add to cart' button accessible name drifted.
sampleOutput.suggestedFix: Re-locate by role with case-insensitive name.

agents.howToUse: Pipe your Playwright report into RCA after every CI run. Configure --file-bugs to auto-draft Jira tickets (via Atlassian MCP inside Claude Code).

agents.name: Flaky Detector
agents.purpose: Diff N runs of the same commit, find tests that pass sometimes / fail sometimes, rank by rate, name the cause, recommend quarantine.
agents.input: Directory of *.json Playwright reports (run the suite N times)
agents.output: FlakyDiagnosis[] — file + title + rate + cause + reason + fix + quarantine flag
agents.promptExcerpt: Diagnose flaky Playwright tests. Pick the cause: race | hardWait | network | animation | sharedState | unknown.
agents.howToUse: Run after every nightly. Quarantined tests get @flaky tag and are skipped on PR runs.

agents.name: Self-Healing Locator
agents.purpose: When a locator breaks, read the real DOM and propose a resilient replacement (role > testid > text > css). Refuses to hallucinate fixes.
agents.input: Playwright report with attached error-context.md (DOM aria snapshot)
agents.output: HealVerdict[] — oldLocator, newLocator, strategy, confidence, reason, escalate flag
agents.config: LLM_MODE · confidence gate (0.7) · --pom <path> to target Page Object
agents.promptExcerpt: Propose the most resilient replacement. Preference order: role > testid > text > css. NEVER invent attributes the DOM does not show.
agents.howToUse: Wire as a post-failure hook in CI · with --apply it writes the patch and re-runs the spec to verify. Inside Claude Code (.claude/agents/heal.md) it edits the real Page Object.
